programme.title: Battles
programme.desc: Airsoft + NIGHT VISION + Gun Game = Best airsoft battle yet!

programme.title: Urban Tails
programme.sub-title: Everybody go Nutz / Its the Grey Seal / Taking Flight / This Stoat is a delight / The Rat Pack
programme.desc: With his furry coat and big bushy tail, you may mistake RED for a playa, but this little squirrel doesn't play around! In his new video, Everybody Go Nutz, he shows many of the skills he possesses.

programme.title: Urban Tails
programme.sub-title: The Greatest Heron / Oh Deer / Hover so High / Swan Sweethearts / Hedgehog Riddle
programme.desc: With her long legs, neck and long head crest, HIP HOP HERON is quite the elegant rap figure. In her video for The Greatest Heron, she shows us around her usual haunts, singing to us from a lake edge,

programme.title: Luigi's Mansion 3: Hunting the Polterkitty Again
programme.desc: The Polterkitty appears again and steals another elevator button. Luigi is on the cat's trail.

programme.title: GORMITI
programme.desc: Our heroes realize that they won't be able to go on a quest for the Elestar as long as they have to stay to defend the One Tower. And when Ao-Ki tells them that the Tower used to be much mightier, they know what they have to do: call on the four Lords of the Gormiti to raise it once again! But Voidus won't let it happen, and while Riff, Ikor, Eron and Trek are focusing to help the Lords, only Ao-Ki can face the leader of the Darkans!

programme.title: GORMITI
programme.desc: RIff, Ikor, Eron, Trek and Ao-Ki find the first missing shard of the Elestar! But it's a windshard, and it flies everywhere at an unbelievable speed. How can they catch it and defend themselves against a Darkan attack at the same time? Maybe with the help of the fastest of the Gormiti, Zephyr!

programme.title: Larva
programme.sub-title: Hot Spring / Hide and seek / Earthquake / Hair-growth Solution / Flood 1 / Swamp
programme.desc: On a freezing winter day, Red and Yellow are relaxing in the puddle of hot spring. Black comes and draws them out of it to take over. Will Red and Yellow be able to secure a seat in the spring? / Red and Yellow are playing hide and seek. Red easily spots Yellow and gives a knuckle as a penalty. Yellow is upset by this punishment and starts to search Red. Can he find Red and gets even with him? / Yellow walks toward Red chewing a gum and blows a bubble. The bubble then floats in the air and pops in Red's head. Angry Red tries a flying kick then an earthquake strikes. The ground splits, leaving a crack into the ground. Red is about to fall into the crack. / Some unknown liquid fall in to the drain and fall down to Yellow's head. And Yellow's hair starts to grow. Red wants same this again! / The sewer is flooded with water. Red and Yellow get on a can, barely avoiding the water, suddenly a monster fish appears and threatens Red and Yellow. They find a vine that hangs in the sewer grill and manage to flee from the fish by climbing it up. But the vine can not hold both weight. / Red and Yellow find a swamp. A giant frog dwells in it and threatens already bogged down Yellow. Will Red and Yellow be able to escape?

programme.title: Larva
programme.sub-title: Walnut / Soda / Frog / Typhoon 1 / Cavity / Coin Toss / Concert
programme.desc: Red and Yellow find solid walnut. But, it seems too solid to break it. Looking at the Black who is punching just beside them, they get an idea. / A bottle of soda falls into the drain. The shock of hitting the ground making a small space between the cap and the bottle, and soda is leaking through the gap. Red and Yellow are watching this with curiosity. / A frog appears in the drain on a rainy day. Red and Yellow are stunned by the its huge size and the power of its tongue, Red tries to flee from it but gets caught. / A strong wind blows into the drain. Yellow and Red flutter around as the wind carries them, then successfully cling on to a thin tree branch. The other insects start to catch Yellow by his tail. A moment later many insects are linked behind Yellow, making the branch unable to hold all of their weight. Now the branch is dangerously stretched and about to be snapped. / Red has a toothache. Yellow brings a string and tie the one end on the bad tooth. As Yellow tries to pull it out, Red become frightened at first but the pain is so great, he agrees to pull it out. Red's decayed tooth, can Yellow pull it out? / Red and Yellow are tossing coin. Yellow keeps losing and ends up having a clout with Red's tongue, Yellow becomes angry and insist on playing. Then Yellow throws it so high and the coin lands on the dung of the dung beetle. / Red and Yellow are eating food residue on the ground. They keep eating until there is only one piece left. Yellow quickly snatches the last remaining food and tries to run away. Red soon begins his pursuit. The pursuit ends in the corner of piles of trashes with an old mini piano.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood: Everybodys Special
programme.desc: Who does the puppet voices in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe? Mister Rogers shows how he works some of the puppets and visits with the voice of Prince Tuesday.

programme.title: Ollie: The Kite / Shortcut / Staying Awake
programme.desc: Ollie's impatience with a kite gets him all tangled up until he realizes staying calm is the best thing he can do. / After a long hike Ollie decides to leave Mabel and take a shortcut home. He soon wonders if it was such a good idea! / Ollie, Mabel and Charles make a plan to watch the sunrise. But will they be able to stay awake to see it?

programme.title: Masha's Spooky Stories
programme.sub-title: Terrifying True Story About Monsters And Those Who Fear Them / Soul Freezing Tale Of Grim Forest And Tiny Timid Bug
programme.desc: Are you afraid of monsters? Sure you are! Let me tell you a scary story about a boy who experienced a real fear

programme.title: Masha's Spooky Stories
programme.sub-title: Troubled Fable About A Kitten Who Was Lost But Found / Super Scary Story Of A Little Boy Who Was Afraid Of Washing
programme.desc: Like all the other children Masha was afraid of being lost until she heard a story about a kitten. He was just a kitten, but with one particular feature- he couldnt survive outside without being lost. / One boy was so afraid of the water that he stopped washing himself and turned into a piggy!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: LankyBox
programme.desc: LankyBox is Roblox superstars Justin and Adam, two best friends who love playing popular video games!

programme.title: Denis
programme.desc: Meet Denis, the gaming superstar who takes on obbys – and builds his own – within Roblox and Minecraft!

programme.title: MeganPlays
programme.desc: Roblox star MeganPlays is known for her positive, family-friendly gaming stories and upbeat vlogs!

programme.title: KidCity
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: LankyBox
programme.desc: LankyBox is Roblox superstars Justin and Adam, two best friends who love playing popular video games!

programme.title: Denis
programme.desc: Meet Denis, the gaming superstar who takes on obbys – and builds his own – within Roblox and Minecraft!

programme.title: Unplugging
programme.desc: Unplugging is a sexy and funny digital detox starring Eva Longoria (Desperate Housewives), Matt Walsh (Veep) and Lea Thompson (Back to the Future). Think a rustic getaway with no phone service, internet or social media is a romantic way to repair your marriage and sex life? Think again. The only spark in Dan and Jeanine's bedroom is from the plug socket and the only solution for this married couple is a quiet, relaxing weekend in a remote mountain village. But what starts as the perfect weekend quickly becomes a disastrous one and without GPS to guide them, or social media to stave off their boredom, Dan and Jeanine are forced to rediscover each other.

programme.title: Chef
programme.desc: When Chef Carl Casper (Jon Favreau) suddenly quits his job at a prominent Los Angeles restaurant after refusing to compromise his creative integrity for its controlling owner (Dustin Hoffman), he is left to figure out what's next. Finding himself in Miami, he teams up with his ex-wife (Sofia Vergara), his friend (John Leguizamo) and his son (Emjay Anthony) to launch a food truck. Taking to the road, Chef Carl goes back to his roots to reignite his passion for the kitchen -- and zest for life and love.

programme.title: Greener Grass
programme.desc: 'Greener Grass' is a hilariously deadpan hellscape of competitive suburbia with a boldly stylised absurdist chain of events that unfurls with increasing fervour after one soccer mom gifts another her infant daughter just to be polite. Writers, directors and stars Jocelyn DeBoer and Dawn Luebbe have created a unique comedy that is destined to be a cult classic. "It's like Wes Anderson taking on a Black Mirror instalment...or David Lynch suddenly directing an episode of Desperate Housewives" - Indiewire

programme.title: Girl Asleep
programme.desc: The world is closing in on Greta Driscoll. On the cusp of turning fifteen she can't bear to leave her childhood, it contains all the things that give her comfort in this incomprehensible new world. She floats in a bubble of loserdom with her only friend Elliott, until her parents throw her a surprise 15th birthday party and she's flung into a parallel place a world that's weirdly erotic, a little bit violent and thoroughly ludicrous - only there can she find herself. Based on the critically acclaimed production by Windmill Theatre, GIRL ASLEEP is a journey into the absurd, scary and beautiful heart of the teenage mind.

programme.title: White Vengeance
programme.desc: White Vengeance tells the story of two brothers contending for supremacy during the fall of the Qin Dynasty, which ruled Imperial China from 221 to 206 BC.

programme.title: Set Up
programme.desc: After a diamond hand turns deadly Sonny seeks out his own revenge. When he finally comes face to face with the friend who betrayed him he will be forced to make a life changing choice.

programme.title: Recoil
programme.desc: A cop turns vigilante after his family is murdered, exacting vengeance on the killers - and then on all criminals who have slipped through the system.

programme.title: The Condemned 2
programme.desc: A bounty hunter becomes the hunted in a high-stakes contest for survival. WWE superstar Randy Orton and Eric Roberts star in this explosive follow-up to The Condemned.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Irish Crown Affair
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Tall Man
programme.desc: When her child goes missing, a mother tries to unravel the legend of the "Big Man" - a person allegedly kidnapping children.

programme.title: Hellbenders
programme.desc: A religious order with a fondness of debauchery, work to drag the worst of demons back to Hell

programme.title: Prowl
programme.desc: When their van breaks down, Amber and her friends accept a ride in the back of a semi...

programme.title: The Shadow People
programme.desc: Newlyweds Megan (Kat Steffens, Parkland) and Andrew (Bug Hall, Castle) have just moved into their dream home with aspirations to start a family. But soon strange events start happening. Voices and shadowy figures haunt Megan, and even Andrew, starts questioning his own sanity as their marriage is being torn apart. The visions grow increasingly real..and threatening, yet Megan is unwilling to relinquish her home. When the appearance of a mysterious priest (C. Thomas Howell, The Amazing Spiderman) unveils the truth behind their nightmare, Megan's reality takes a desperate turn that her haunting visions never could have predicted.

programme.title: Love On Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot whose work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: A Royal Surprise
programme.desc: When Riley's boyfriend, Mandla, invites her to South Africa to meet his family, she is shocked to discover that he is a prince. The news puts Riley's trust in Mandla in jeopardy, and he must do what he can to win her love back.

programme.title: Love in Focus
programme.desc: When the hit show actress Jenna Wilde stars in suddenly gets cancelled, the press start circling. To escape the chaos Jenna retreats to a snowy cabin in the mountains. Unexpectedly, she must share this peaceful place with a rude and rugged nature photographer Chris Dixon. Their coolness towards each other starts to thaw when Chris helps Jenna audition for other shows.

programme.title: Bookworm and the Beast
programme.desc: Izzy is ready to make a difference in the world as she starts her career in public relations. When Grant Beiste - the big-headed corporate celebrity in town - accidentally hits her father with a car, Izzy is thrown into a public scandal that forces her to work closely with Grant. As she fights to save both her father and Grant's public image, she falls in love and learns not to judge a book by it's cover.

programme.title: Love Finds You in Sugarcreek
programme.desc: A father and son fleeing a shocking and brutal tragedy settle in the predominantly Amish town of Sugarcreek, Ohio. They are taken in by three sisters who offer the father work as a handyman, but a local policewoman begins to become suspicious of his past.

programme.title: The Mercenary
programme.desc: A greedy Polish mercenary aids a mine worker and peasant girl as they lead a revolution against the oppressive Mexican Government, and are pursued by an American rival.

programme.title: Git Along Little Dogies
programme.desc: When war breaks out between oilmen and cattle ranchers, Gene sides with the ranchers until he learns that oil will bring a railroad to town.

programme.title: Apache Rose
programme.desc: Old Western Movie from 1947 starring Roy Rogers directed by William Witney: Apache Rose - Roy is an oil prospector. His efforts to get drilling rights on an old Spanish land grant are countered by gamblers from an off-shore gambling boat determined to control the land (and oil) themselves.

programme.title: The White, the Yellow, and the Black
programme.desc: In the 19th century, when the Japanese Emperor sends a gift pony to the US President it gets stolen and ransomed by Indians but Sheriff Gideon aided by an inept Japanese servant offers to deliver the ransom.

programme.title: To Hell and Gone
programme.desc: A crafty drifter crosses paths with a gang of murderous thieves in the middle of nowhere, AZ.

programme.title: Twelve Trees Of Christmas
programme.desc: Starring Lindy Booth, Melanie Brown, and Robin Dunne. Cheri rallies her Manhattan neighborhood to participate in a Christmas tree contest when their local library is abruptly set for demolition by an ambitious but handsome developer. Feat: Mel B.

programme.title: Christmas in Wonderland
programme.desc: Starring Matthew Knight and Chris Kattan. Three children and their father move from California to Canada. When they go shopping at the mall, they find counterfeit cash, inadvertently help catch crooks, and make a discovery about Santa.

programme.title: Save The Wedding
programme.desc: Meg and Tyler have never gotten along with each other but when they work together to save the best friends' wedding, they discover they actually make a good team and begin a little romance of their own.

programme.title: Christmas Mingle
programme.desc: A 30-something marketing executive with a top-notch career, killer wardrobe, dream apartment and great friends fills out a profile on a dating website hoping to find Mr. Right. However, her attempts at impressing her dream guy ends in disaster.

programme.title: Last Girl Standing
programme.desc: Five years ago, a masked killer brutally murdered a group of friends. Since then, Camryn, the lone survivor, has struggled to reclaim her shattered life. She might have survived the brutal massacre but what happens to the final girl after the credits roll?

programme.title: Hatchet
programme.desc: When a group of tourists in a New Orleans haunted swamp tour find themselves stranded in the wilderness, their evening of fun and spooks turns into a horrific nightmare. Bored with the New Orleans' Mardi Gras, lovelorn Ben (Joel Moore) talks his pal Marcus (Deon Richmond) into taking a creepy tour through the Louisiana swamplands. But they breakdown in eerie territory which legend has it is haunted by the force-of-nature spirit of Victor Crowley (Kane Hodder). And soon the bayous become awash with spurting blood from their own mutilated bodies.

programme.title: Mother and Child
programme.desc: A moving tale of three women and the unbreakable bond between mother and child. Mother and Child is a powerful drama addressing the taboos surrounding adoption whilst telling the stories of a fifty year old woman, the daughter she gave up for adoption 35 years ago, and a woman looking to adopt a child of her own.

programme.title: My Birthday Romance
programme.desc: Callie Fitzgerald is tired of her family fixing her up and questioning her single status. She is determined to find a pretend boyfriend for her 35th birthday party just so her family will leave her alone. What she didn't expect was to actually fall for him.

programme.title: Hell's House
programme.desc: Jimmy idolizes bootlegger Matt, and when he refuses to implicate his friend, he is sent to reform school. He befriends Shorty, a boy with a heart condition, and escapes to let the world know about the brutal conditions.

programme.title: Frame Of Mind
programme.desc: Desperately seeking a new start, NYPD Detective, David Secca (CARL T. EVANS) and his pregnant wife escape the struggles of New York City and return to their hometown in New Jersey. He reluctantly takes a job with the local Police Department. His priorities abruptly change when he stumbles upon a mysterious strip of 8mm film, discovered accidently in an antique jewelry box. Things really heat up as it becomes obvious that he found a key piece of evidence in the Kennedy assassination.

programme.title: Flying Lessons
programme.desc: With her life at a crossroads, 25 year old Sophie Conway (MAGGIE GRACE) returns to the small town she always tried to forget. Once home, she's faced with past lovers, a tangled relationship with her Mother, and Harry Pleasant, an Alzheimer's patient who in quite an opposite fashion, shares in Sophie's struggle to remember.

programme.title: Subject 16
programme.desc: A man wakes gasping for air in a sealed cylinder, but cannot recall his own name or the name of the woman who freed him from the chamber.

programme.title: Les Perruches
programme.desc: Lili, an ill young woman, is faced one morning with the sudden loss of her hair. The imagination of her friend Laura is going to change the course of a day, which had badly begun.

programme.title: Sullivan
programme.desc: An unlikely young man imagines himself as the greatest football player of all time, but in doing so, hides behind a false persona instead of being himself.

programme.title: Pot O' Gold
programme.desc: Jimmy goes to work with his uncle, the owner of a food factory. Before he gets there, he befriends an Irish family who happens to be his uncle's worst enemy because of their love for music and in-house band who constantly practices.

programme.title: After Life
programme.desc: After a horrific car accident, Anna (Christina Ricci) wakes up to find the funeral director (Liam Neeson) preparing her body for her funeral.

programme.title: Margin Call
programme.desc: Follows the key people at an investment bank over a 24-hour period during the early stages of the 2008 financial crisis.

programme.title: Beyond the Law
programme.desc: A former mobster turned businessman and a police detective must contend with a dirty ex-cop looking to bring the killer of his son to justice.

programme.title: Foster
programme.desc: A heart-warming story of family and friendship starring Academy Award Nominee Toni Collette and Ioan Gruffudd.

programme.title: Warning
programme.desc: Black Mirror meets Wild Tales in this visually-arresting, thought-provoking sci-fi thriller exploring the meaning of life through multiple interconnected lives. This highly original film stars Annabelle Wallis (Peaky Blinders, Annabelle), Thomas Jane (The Mist), Alex Pettyfer (Magic Mike), Patrick Schwarzenegger (Daniel isn't Real), Alice Eve (She's Out of My League) and Rupert Everett (The Happy Prince).

programme.title: Predestination
programme.desc: From the directors of Daybreakers, PREDESTINATION chronicles the life of a Temporal Agent (Ethan Hawke) sent on an intricate series of time-travel journeys designed to stop crimes before they are committed. Now, on his final assignment, he must pursue the one criminal that has eluded him throughout time.

programme.title: Dark Star
programme.desc: John Carpenter's pulp science fiction classic - this brilliantly clever and funny parody of Stanley Kubrick's 2001: A Space Odyssey, follows a warped intergalactic mission to blow up unstable planets. Four bored astronauts fill in time between missions catching up on their tans with the help of a sun-lamp, playing with a suspiciously plastic-looking alien mascot they are taking back to Earth and conversing with their female version of Hal. Things start to go horribly wrong when the spaceship computer misfires and a 'smart bomb' thinks it is God.

programme.title: The Immortal Wars: Rebirth
programme.desc: Rebirth takes place during the early brutal stages of Dominion Industries. In this story watch Olive and other deviants undergo a series of deadly experiments lead by Laurie Harvey and her team.

programme.title: The Day Time Ended
programme.desc: A futuristic solar home in the far desert was supposed to be their refuge from urban crime. To their horror, the family discovers they're caught in a mind-boggling time warp caused by mysterious aliens with a sinister secret.

programme.title: Love on the Vines
programme.desc: When Diana inherits half her uncle's vineyard, she is surprised to find a rule requiring her to work the land with new co-owner Seth or risk losing the land.

programme.title: Nash
programme.desc: This coming of age documentary chronicles the life of NBA All Star Steve Nash as he tries to navigate his way through the somewhat toils of professional sports while trying to leave a lasting legacy on and off the court.

programme.title: A Winter Rose: Directors Cut
programme.desc: After being diagnosed with cancer, a legendary singer, her manager and husband discover a gifted but troubled orphan to be her successor.

programme.title: What Would Jesus Do? The Journey Continues
programme.desc: The journey continues from What Would Jesus Do? (2010) as the drifter arrives into a new town inspiring a group of people to live as Jesus would.

programme.title: An Hour Behind
programme.desc: The time change and a case of mistaken identity result in a wonderful blind date for Trish and Parker, but is it enough to keep them together?

programme.title: Tennessee Williams' The Roman Spring of Mrs. Stone
programme.desc: After moving to Rome, a lonely widow finds herself consumed by a destructive love for a young Italian man in this adaptation of Tennessee Williams' haunting novella.

programme.title: Love, Rosie
programme.desc: Rosie and Alex have been best friends since age six. Just as they're discovering the joys of teenage nights on the town, they're also discovering dating disasters. As they dream of travelling the world, they decide to leave their small British town for Boston together to attend university. But fate has other plans, as Rosie discovers that her crazy night out with the most popular boy in school has left her pregnant. She encourages Alex to go to America without her. Over the next twelve years, their lives change in all kinds of ways. Their undeniable connection remains, but can their friendship survive the years and miles?

programme.title: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Jessica Tucker, a widow and successful doctor, is trying to juggle work and family when she learns she's up for the top job at the hospital. For a well-deserved vacation, Jessica books a stay at a resort in Fiji so she and her daughter can disconnect and bond. During her stay, Jessica strikes up a friendship with Will, the charming owner of the resort. As Jessica and Will spend more time together, she begins to relax and starts to wonder if this island paradise can give her the life – and love – she's always hoped for.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Ambitious Layla Bennet co-hosts morning show Wake Up Chicago! with her handsome colleague Derek Dray. They don't always see eye to eye, so when they suddenly must care for a baby together, it's their worst nightmare! As they juggle night feeds with their hectic work lives, they can't deny their growing chemistry… could this be love?

programme.title: A Prayer Before Dawn
programme.desc: An English boxer incarcerated in Thailand fights in Muay Thai tournaments to earn his freedom.

programme.title: Patriots Day
programme.desc: Chronicles the courage of the people of Boston during the real-life manhunt for the Boston Marathon bombers.

programme.title: The Aviator
programme.desc: A biopic depicting the early years of aviator Howard Hughes' career from the late 1920s to the mid 1940s.

programme.title: Pandorum
programme.desc: Two astronauts (Dennis Quaid, Vantage Point and Ben Foster, 30 Days of Night) awaken in a hyper-sleep chamber aboard a seemingly abandoned spacecraft. It's pitch black, they are disoriented, and the only sound is a low rumble and creak from the belly of the ship. They can't remember anything like who they are and what their mission is, but one thing they do realise very quickly is that they are not alone. Slowly the spacecraft's shocking, deadly secrets are revealed and the astronauts find that they must fight to stay alive and that their survival is more important than they could ever have imagined. Directed by Christian Alvart and also starring Cam Gigandet (Twilight), Cung Le (Tekken) and newcomer Antje Traue.

programme.title: Last Girl Standing
programme.desc: Five years ago, a masked killer brutally murdered a group of friends. Since then, Camryn (Akasha Villalobos), the lone survivor, has struggled to reclaim her shattered life. Wracked with guilt and paranoia, Camryn leads a depressingly lonely existence until Nick (Brian Villalobos), a new co-worker, befriends Camryn and attempts to integrate her into his group of friends. Just when she might be ready to start a new life, Camryn's past comes back to haunt her. Can Camryn ever have a life again, or is she destined to be alone?

programme.title: I Know Who Killed Me
programme.desc: An idyllic small town is rocked when Aubrey Fleming (Lindsay Lohan), a bright and promising young college student is abducted and tortured by a sadistic serial killer. When she manages to escape, the traumatised girl who regains consciousness in the hospital insists that her identity is that of Dakota Moss a stripper in a seedy club and that the real Aubrey Fleming is still in mortal danger. A taut and gripping erotic thriller with a captivating riddle at its centre, I Know Who Killed Me explores the dark side of identity, sexuality and obsession.

programme.title: Benji's Very Own Christmas Story
programme.desc: On a surprise visit to meet Kris Kringle, Benji and his friends are shocked to discover that he plans to take the night off on Christmas Eve! They must work together to change his mind and save Christmas.

programme.title: Benji
programme.desc: Benji makes his cinematic debut as the beloved dog who has captured the heart of the town. When his favourite friends are kidnapped, Benji sets out to track them down and save the day.

programme.title: Stranger in our Bed
programme.desc: Charlotte is feeling trapped in her marriage to a wealthy and controlling husband. She begins an affair with another man, who one day mysteriously disappears without a trace. Behind her husband's back, she secretly begins an investigation into his disappearance, teaming up with her lover's sister to uncover the truth behind what happened. It quickly becomes clear that nothing is as it seems.

programme.title: Freehold
programme.desc: Twisted and highly sinister. Hussein, a young amoral London estate agent will do anything to get his commission. His life takes a dramatic turn when he is tormented by an angry ex-client, Orlan (Javier Botet: It) who has claimed Hussein's flat as his, unbeknownst to the estate agent.

programme.title: Xmoor
programme.desc: When the hunters become the hunted. In a bid to catch sight of a mysterious killer beast, documentary-makers Georgia and Matt, along with animal expert Fox, head out onto the dark terrain of Exmoor. But when they encounter a series of corpses, they know they are caught in the clutches of something much worse. This hair-raising creature feature, brings a sinister twist to the table.

programme.title: The Void
programme.desc: Enter this blood-soaked nightmare at your own risk. When police officer Carter happens upon a blood-soaked figure limping down a deserted road, he rushes the man to a hospital, only to discover a horrifying reality all linked to the mysterious hooded cult figures who are surrounding the hospital. Now Carter must lead the survivors on a hellish voyage in a bid to survive! Totally mind-bending!

programme.title: Christmas On Holly Lane
programme.desc: Sarah, Riley and Cat reunite for the holiday's, drawn together by their lifelong friendship and the chance to spend Christmas in the house that brought them so many happy childhood memories (2018)

programme.title: Christmas On Holly Lane
programme.desc: Sarah, Riley and Cat reunite for the holiday's, drawn together by their lifelong friendship and the chance to spend Christmas in the house that brought them so many happy childhood memories (2018)

programme.title: Christmas Truce
programme.desc: An American soldier and a Belgian woman fall in love during a brief holding truce amid the Battle of the Bulge, promising to reunite at the end of the war. Stars Craig Olejnik and Ali Liebert (2015)

programme.title: Christmas Truce
programme.desc: An American soldier and a Belgian woman fall in love during a brief holding truce amid the Battle of the Bulge, promising to reunite at the end of the war. Stars Craig Olejnik and Ali Liebert (2015)

programme.title: Annie Claus Is Coming To Town
programme.desc: Santa's daughter takes her first trip away from the North Pole during the Christmas season.

programme.title: Annie Claus Is Coming To Town
programme.desc: Santa's daughter takes her first trip away from the North Pole during the Christmas season.

programme.title: The Gift Of Christmas
programme.desc: A divided Kentucky family must overcome their differences to save the town's annual Christmas Eve church concert. Stars Bruce Davison, Dee Wallace (2020)

programme.title: The Gift Of Christmas
programme.desc: A divided Kentucky family must overcome their differences to save the town's annual Christmas Eve church concert. Stars Bruce Davison, Dee Wallace (2020)

programme.title: Love On Repeat
programme.desc: When Amber starts re-living the same day over and over again, she realizes she is stuck in limbo and must finally decide what it will take to make her truly happy. Starring Jen Lilley (2019)

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Lily goes home to help run her Aunts Inn. Has handsome loner Marcus come out of his shell since her return to town? Will the unexpected appearance of Lily's ex pull him back into his shell. (2020)

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: Romance Novelist Jo must work with Navy Seal officer Colin on her next book. Will Colin put Jo through the wringer, or will cupids bow bring this unlikely pair together in harmony? (2017)

programme.title: Love by Chance
programme.desc: Claire, a pastry chef, is busy running her new restaurant, but her meddling mother is preoccupied with her lack of love life. Without her knowledge, Claire's mother finds her the perfect man. (2016)

programme.title: SAPPHIRE
programme.desc: On a bleak winter's day, the body of a beautiful young girl is found on waste land. She has been stabbed violently through the heart. As a murder hunt is launched, the police find a range of suspects, each with their own motives for killing her.

programme.title: Fright
programme.desc: Amanda occasionally baby-sits for friends and neighbors, so when the newly-arrived couple in the village ask her to sit for them, she accepts. When the baby is asleep and the parents have left, the house adopts an atmosphere of menace. The simplest domestic sound becomes an assault on the nerves: the relentless tick of the pendulum clock and the tapping, squeaking, breathing of an old house at dead of night. But soon it becomes apparent that her fears are more than just the workings of an over-active imagination...

programme.title: Demons of the Mind
programme.desc: In a remote province of Bavaria fear and superstition are rife. The disappearance of several young girls leads the community to believe that a demon prowls the impenetrable forest

programme.title: Straight on Till Morning
programme.desc: Brenda Thompson moved to London to begin living those intoxicated fantasies that all young women imagine city life to offer. Soon after her arrival she begins a relationship with Peter with whom she is tremendously happy.

programme.title: Conspiracy
programme.desc: After a former Special Operations United States Marine gets wounded during combat in Iraq, MacPherson (Kilmer) reluctantly agrees to join a fellow soldier at his Arizona ranch. But when MacPherson arrives, his friend has mysteriously disappeared and no one will admit to knowing him.

programme.title: W.E
programme.desc: The affair between King Edward VIII and American divorcée Wallis Simpson and a contemporary romance between a married woman and a Russian security guard.

programme.title: Hummingbird
programme.desc: Joey Jones is an ex-Special Forces soldier who is homeless on the streets after going on the run from a military court-martial. In desperation, he breaks into a vacated luxury apartment where he seizes the opportunity to turn his life around: get clean and get a job.

programme.title: Entrapment
programme.desc: Gin Baker, a beautiful and ambitious insurance agent, convinces her bosses to let her take on a difficult and risky case after pieces of priceless art are stolen and not recovered. Her mission is to become involved with an aging, but active Master Thief, Robert "Mac" MacDougal.

programme.title: Starship Troopers 2: Hero Of The Federation
programme.desc: A small group of troopers find themselves taking refuge in an abandoned outpost as they attempt to fight the encroaching arachnids - not realizing that a much graver danger is actually infiltrating their unit.

programme.title: Starship Troopers 3: Marauder
programme.desc: Johnny Rico is now a general, and called back into action to defeat the bugs.

programme.title: Geronimo: An American Legend
programme.desc: A legendary warrior leads the last remaining free Indian tribe against U.S. Army forces intent on their subjugation.

programme.title: Vantage Point
programme.desc: The attempted assassination of the president is told from five different perspectives.

programme.title: Joe Dirt (2001)
programme.desc: Jeers turn to cheers when a hard luck but plunky itinerant janitor becomes an unlikely hero.

programme.title: Joe Dirt 2: Beautiful Loser
programme.desc: Joe Dirt travels back in time and becomes rich because he knows the future.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own (1992)
programme.desc: Daring female athletes win over a skeptical public and lead their team to victory in the WWII-era women's baseball league.

programme.title: Guarding Tess
programme.desc: Shirley MacClaine plays Tess Carlisle, a cantankerous, much beloved former First Lady whose husband died in office nearly a decade ago. Now, far removed from Washington, she directs her extraordinary intelligence to a battle of wills with her bodyguard, Secret Service Agent Doug Chesnic (Nicolas Cage).

programme.title: Mommy
programme.desc: Winner of the Cannes Jury Prize, Mommy is a deeply personal portrait of adolescence and motherhood from modern cinema's most prodigious young talent, Xavier Dolan. When 15 year-old Steve is thrown out of a juvenile centre, his single mother Diane takes on the daunting task of home schooling her troubled son. Struggling to make ends meet and rocked by Steve's livewire temperament, a shy, reclusive neighbour may prove to be the duo's unlikely saviour.

programme.title: Five Nights in Maine
programme.desc: A man, reeling from the tragic loss of his wife, travels to rural Maine to seek answers from his estranged mother-in-law, who is herself confronting grief. With David Oyelowo and Dianne Wiest.

programme.title: The Untold Story
programme.desc: In every person's life, there is a moment when we discover what true success is. Edward is learning that lesson later in life, but thankfully not too late. Edward finds hope and inspiration in what he considered unlikely sources. Catarina, his fiery new neighbor, is as straightforward as they come and shows Edward that pretending to be something isn't the same as actually being it…and this chance meeting finally gives his life meaning.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: Gertrude Bell, a daughter of wealthy British parents, has no interest in the social life of the London elite. Balls, receptions, and the British aristocracy bring her only boredom. Aspiring to have at least some kind of activity in her life, Gertrude decides to find freedom and move to be with her uncle, who occupies a high diplomatic position in Tehran. So begins her lifelong adventure across the Arab world, a journey marked by danger, a passionate affair with a British officer, Henry Cadogan, and an encounter with the legendary T.E. Lawrence.

programme.title: The East
programme.desc: A harrowing war epic based on astonishing true events. A young soldier finds himself torn between duty and conscience.

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: A New Yorker, takes up a job as a security with the Empire State Armoured Truck Company after failing to secure a job with the NYPD. After discovering that he is able to use his position to his advantage, he is drawn into an elaborate scheme to rob his company, resulting in the largest cash heist.

programme.title: Life on the Line
programme.desc: As a huge electrical storm sweeps towards Texas, lineman Beau (John Travolta, PULP FICTION) is haunted by memories of his brother's death by lightning years earlier. Bailey (Kate Bosworth, SUPERMAN RETURNS), the niece Beau helped raise, has a secret she needs to share with her boyfriend, Duncan.

programme.title: Beyond the Law
programme.desc: A former mobster turned businessman and a police detective must contend with a dirty ex-cop looking to bring the killer of his son to justice.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A poet flirts with Shauni, and with danger, when he accidently gets involved with two jewel thieves.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Shauni and Eddie visit a fortune teller who predicts that Eddie will soon meet his first true love.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Slade and Brody tangle with a violent surf gang while Mitch's life is thrown into turmoil.

programme.title: Mehek S1 E30
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Dholi Beats S1 E30
programme.desc: The story revolves around Geet, a young woman who follows her father's footsteps as a dhol player, challenging societal norms about gender roles in music. Her journey is supported by her husband, Malhar, who helps her pursue her dreams.

programme.title: King of Hearts S1 E30
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances S1 E30
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar S1 E30
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: The Good Son S1 E26
programme.desc: Raja Beta is an Indian television drama series that revolves around the life of Vedant Tripathi, an ideal and dutiful son. Vedant is adopted by the Tripathi family and grows up to become a successful gynecologist. Despite facing challenges and prejudice due to his adopted status, he wins the love and respect of his family through his unwavering dedication, kindness, and sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Peace Parks
programme.desc: In this series, we follow the trail of the Transfrontier Parks. We explore why these conservation areas are important and what they protect. programme.title: Nuts about Squirrels
programme.desc: Squirrels have conquered tundra, deserts, forests and more, developing ingenious life skills along the way, from stashing nuts to fighting snakes.

programme.title: The Peninsula
programme.desc: Mountains are responsible for the whole morphology of Iberia. They are also the birthplace of the rivers that distribute life throughout the territory.

programme.title: The Peninsula
programme.desc: The coast of the Iberian Peninsula meets both the Atlantic Ocean and the Mediterranean Sea. It's one of the richest oceanic habitats of Europe. It hosts thousands of species of wild animals.

programme.title: These Birds Are Made For Walking
programme.desc: Few things are more wondrous than the gift of flight, but 60 extraordinary species of bird have chosen to give it up – the question is, why?

programme.title: The Secret Life of Owls
programme.desc: We all recognize the haunting nighttime hoots of the Great Horned Owl. This powerful predator lives all over the Americas. Yet it's rare to catch a glimpse. The Secret Life of Owls gives us intimate look at this amazing bird of prey and introduces us to some passionate owl experts along the way.

programme.title: Eagles
programme.desc: Whether in Alaska or in the Dolomites, eagles are generally seen as Kings of the skies. This film devotes itself on the one hand to the bald eagle, the heraldic bird of the United States, and on the other, the Golden Eagle, Europe's largest predatory bird. Many bald eagles live in the Chilkoot State Park in Alaska's south. In fact, more than 400 pairs reside there for the entire year. With a wingspan of some 2.5 metres, they are amongst the largest of their species. The offspring have to leave the eyrie by September at the latest, as then, winter sets in. On clear, starry nights, one can experience the Northern Lights. There are certain places where especially many eagles group. 3000 to 4500 of them. Because, beneath the Chilkat ice blanket, chum salmon feel at home. The reason for this is the volcanic activity of the surrounding areas. Hot sources feed the different tributaries of the Chilkat. It is the fourth and final salmon migration of the year - nowhere else does this take place so late in the year. This combination of ice-free water and spawning fish facilitates the survival of many young eagles through their first winter. In the Dolomites, we observe a Golden Eagle couple and their offspring. The strategy of hunter and hunted is impressively documented. For the very first time we experience a groundhog's fight for survival, attempting to flee the eagles' eyrie at a height of 2000 metres, despite the fact this means confrontation with the eagle's offspring. Golden Eagles have virtually conquered the entire northern hemisphere. But the future hunting grounds of the young eagles belongs to the most beautiful: the Dolomites - as majestic as the Kings of the skies.

programme.title: Germany's Wild Birds
programme.desc: By monitoring ten interesting bird-watching locations, we document not only the silver herons in the Westerwald, but also the last great bustards in Havelland. Then there are the great crested grebes in their splendid plumages, shown building their nests and during courtship, in an area of extinct volcanoes: the Eiffel. Add to this, exotic wild birds and colorful parakeets, the newest members of the population in a park in Wiesbaden. We have resting migratory birds, ducks and waders on the west banks of the Steinhuder Lake. On the border to the Netherlands, in the moorlands near Münster, we find the only wild flamingos in Germany. Equally interesting are the fire geese, avocets and many birds of the coastal region not far from Hamburg harbor. At Federsee Lake in Upper Swabia, we observe the inhabitants of the extensive reed zones: bearded tits. Then we have the birds of fortune, the cranes, which interrupt their long journeys by resting on the Baltic coast. Last, but not least, in the Feldberg lake region we accompany the ranger on an exciting sea eagle excursion. With this film, you are invited to experience a journey through the wonderful world of birds.

programme.title: Down to Earth
programme.desc: They've given up the wonderful art of flying. Or was it an art they never possessed? The brain structure and anatomy of flightless birds indicate that they descended from "flyers" – so, why don't they fly?

programme.title: Crazy Creature Costumes
programme.desc: Animals shock us with the most bizarre appearances - some even look like they've been dressing up. But the weird and wonderful shapes and colours of nature are vital to the animals' lives. Sometimes they're disguised to help blend in, other times they are designed to stand out and show off. But whether it's a monkey in make-up or a salamander's toxic stripes, the weird and wonderful outfits enable the creature to thrive.

programme.title: Hummingbirds: Jewelled Messengers
programme.desc: Hummingbirds live at the limits of what is possible. They have the highest metabolism with a heart rate of 1,200 beats per minute of any vertebrate. Their wings beat 50 times a second. They can hover on the spot, and even fly backwards. To our eyes, they are just a blur. But with the aid of high-speed cameras we can slow down their hyperactive lives and look into their secret world.

programme.title: The Secret of Migrating Birds
programme.desc: Each year in spring, Israel witnesses a unique spectacle. Many millions of migrating birds cross the land bridge between Africa, Asia and Europe.Their first major roosting place after an exhausting nonstop flight over the African deserts is in southern Israel – a vital stopover. Here they replenish their energy reserves. The flocks of migrating birds are pursued by flocks of ornithologists. Hundreds of birders flood into the port city of Eilat on the Red Sea to take part in the Migration Festival. For a week, Israel's southernmost coastal resort is home to international scientists and amateur birders.

programme.title: Snowy Owl: Queen of the North
programme.desc: No other owls are capable of surviving the extreme conditions, whereas the snowy owl is able to hunt through six months of bright sunshine and six months of twilight. This film follows a pair of snowy owls as they breed on the tundra of the High Arctic, 300 miles inside the Arctic Circle. Lemming numbers are low this year. Five owlets hatch and they face a struggle if any are going to survive.

programme.title: Stage 12
programme.desc: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.

programme.title: Stage 13
programme.desc: It's time to show our strength and gain respect from the gods of Olympus. Our gladiators have many events set out by no other than Hercules himself. The coliseum is ready here on this mythological island of Cyprus, so we have landed in Limassol were again 12 Top Strongmen are battling for the title and ranking points.

programme.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 14
programme.desc: The only and official world championship Truckpulling for its 10th year, again at the Strongman Champions league. With the 3 times Worldchampion Kelvin de Ruiter – defending his title. This championship has trucks in all shapes and sizes which is a lot like our athletes, there all different pay loads, but does the biggest win or is it the strongest.

programme.title: Stage 15
programme.desc: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever.

programme.title: Stage 16
programme.desc: Part 2 of the World Finals of the Strongman Champions League tour 2023 at the Sarajevo Centar Skenderija in Bosnia. 3 Events was done already and amazing results have been set. Who will be the new World champion? Find out here, who, after 16 stages, will be crowned World Champion 2023.

programme.desc: The Strongman Champions League kicks off its 2014 season in Martinique.

programme.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 2, Germany FIBO Power
